probes.name: invalid-method
probes.description: invalid method requests return structured JSON-RPC errors
probes.risk: Sends one unknown JSON-RPC method after initialize; servers should answer with an error instead of crashing or returning success.

probes.name: invalid-params
probes.description: invalid params return structured JSON-RPC errors
probes.risk: Sends deliberately invalid params to a common MCP method; tolerant servers may need to opt out of this stricter probe.

probes.name: notification
probes.description: notifications do not receive responses
probes.risk: Sends one unknown JSON-RPC notification; servers should not reply to notifications even when the method is unknown.

probes.name: malformed-json
probes.description: malformed JSON does not crash the server
probes.risk: Writes one malformed line to stdin; servers may return a structured parse error or ignore it, but should not crash.
